chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1781 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No.967/2025. 2. For order on office objection. 3. For orders on MA No.8690/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 14.02.2025 Mr. Mazhar Ali Laghari advocate for petitioners. 1. Urgency disposed of. 2to4. Learned counsel for the petitioners at the very outset states that Board of Revenue, Government of Sindh has issued a notification dated 21.10.2024 for redressal of the grievances by establishing a “Public Grievances Redressal Cell” under the Supervision of concerned Deputy Commissioner across the Sindh province and the grievance of the petitioners cover up under the said notification; hence, the petitioners would exhaust such remedy. However, he seeks disposal of instant petition with direction to the Deputy Commissioner concerned for decision on the grievance application of the petitioners within a reasonable time. In view of the above instant petition stands disposed of with direction to the Deputy Commissioner to dispose of the grievance application to be filed by the petitioners, if filed, within a period of thirty days. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
